name: Eemsdelta (Netherlands)
description: A white field bearing the municipal logo: blue wavy lines above and green wavy lines below the name, with 'GEMEENTE EEMSDELTA' lettered across the centre.
history: Flag of the municipality of Eemsdelta in the province of Groningen, formed in 2021 from Appingedam, Delfzijl and Loppersum. The flag is the municipality's logo/wordmark banner rather than a heraldic design.

features.role: blue wavy lines above the name
green wavy lines below the name
